allow: PowerShell($url = 'https://win.rustup.rs/x86_64'; $dest = "$env:USERPROFILE\\rustup-init.exe"; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url -OutFile $dest -UseBasicParsing; Get-Item $dest | Select-Object FullName, Length)
PowerShell($env:Path = "$env:USERPROFILE\\.cargo\\bin;$env:Path"; rustup component add clippy rustfmt 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 10)
PowerShell($env:Path = "$env:USERPROFILE\\.cargo\\bin;$env:Path"; cargo --version; cargo clippy --version; cargo fmt --version)
PowerShell($env:Path = "$env:USERPROFILE\\.cargo\\bin;$env:Path"; Set-Location "C:\\Testing IDE\\apps\\desktop\\src-tauri"; cargo fmt --check 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 50)
PowerShell($env:Path = "$env:USERPROFILE\\.cargo\\bin;$env:Path"; Set-Location "C:\\Testing IDE\\apps\\desktop\\src-tauri"; cargo check --all-targets 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 80)

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap 32, 32; $g = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($bmp\); $g.Clear\([System.Drawing.Color]::FromArgb\(255, 30, 30, 30\)\); $brush = New-Object System.Drawing.SolidBrush\([System.Drawing.Color]::FromArgb\(255, 100, 200, 255\)\); $g.FillRectangle\($brush, 8, 8, 16, 16\); $g.Dispose\(\); $icon = [System.Drawing.Icon]::FromHandle\($bmp.GetHicon\(\)\); $stream = New-Object System.IO.FileStream\("C:\\Testing IDE\\apps\\desktop\\src-tauri\\icons\\icon.ico", [System.IO.FileMode]::Create\); $icon.Save\($stream\); $stream.Close\(\); $icon.Dispose\(\); $bmp.Dispose\(\); Get-Item "C:\\Testing IDE\\apps\\desktop\\src-tauri\\icons\\icon.ico" | Select-Object Length)
PowerShell($env:Path = "$env:USERPROFILE\\.cargo\\bin;$env:Path"; Set-Location "C:\\Testing IDE\\apps\\desktop\\src-tauri"; cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings; "exit=$LASTEXITCODE")
Bash(gh issue create --repo Rajveerx11/Testing-IDE --title 'ADR backlog: 0001 \(embeddings\) — opened, 0002 \(vec0 migration\) + 0003 \(LlmProvider\) pending' --body ' *)
